decisions.decision: Email = env-switched sendEmail() seam; Mailpit local, Gmail-SMTP+App-Password default $0 prod; Resend+domain optional upgrade
decisions.rationale: SEED-001 rec #1: only truly-free no-domain path with good deliverability; reverses old 'must buy a domain' blocker

decisions.decision: Finalize = additive nullable winning_option_id FK on polls + reuse status open→closed
decisions.rationale: Phase-2 read-only path already honors status!=open; minimal additive schema; neon-http single-statement close

decisions.decision: All sends best-effort/non-blocking via Next.js after(); never fail the vote/close
decisions.rationale: RESEARCH resolved the Vercel-SMTP caveat: only port 25 blocked; after() runs past redirect
The 12px Caption/Badge role is an APPROVED carry-forward formalized in shipped Phase 3 UI-SPEC (03-UI-SPEC.md:78-80); do NOT collapse to 4 — it would make Phase 4 inconsistent with shipped UI

decisions.decision: Claude Design brief hardened to a staged, contract-preserving evolution (not greenfield)
decisions.rationale: hyrum/gall/zawinski/fitts/leaky/choose-boring lenses: protect shipped UI + approved 04-UI-SPEC, fence design-layer scope creep (dark mode optional, no new fonts/libs)

context_notes: Fully autonomous --auto --chain pipeline (discuss→plan→execute). discuss+research+ui-spec+pattern-map all DONE, committed, and pushed to origin/master (HEAD f51491a, working tree clean). The gsd-planner was running in the background when the user paused (agent id ae34b9b5f6e939c9d) — a harness background agent, so it may terminate on session pause without writing plans; the resume action handles both cases. planner_model=opus, MVP_MODE=true, granularity=coarse; expect exactly 2 vertical-slice plans (04-01 email service+invites+VOTE-04 confirmation; 04-02 winning_option_id schema+closePoll+finalization emails), 04-02's email-send reusing 04-01's sendEmail() seam.
